name: Nellie's Vinegar Taffy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, salt, and vinegar in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the sugar has dissolved.
2. Gradually pour evaporated milk into the mixture while keeping it boiling. Continue cooking on medium heat until the mixture reaches a firm ball when dipped in cold water.
3. Remove from heat and transfer to a buttered pan. Allow to cool slightly before pulling the candy until it is light and no longer sticky to the touch.
